{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary purpose of synchronizing physical clocks in a distributed system?",
      "options": ["A) To improve system security", "B) To increase system performance", "C) To ensure consistency across all nodes", "D) To reduce system latency"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Synchronizing physical clocks ensures consistency across all nodes in a distributed system, which is crucial for applications that rely on precise timekeeping."
